reviews.review_msg: Very nice guy but I've never met a more unorganised prof. No pre-lecture materials/readings, so you show up to class on a prayer with how fast he talks and the constant skipping of Slides. Material straddles multiple weeks so it's unclear which Module we're on, and you can bet that files won't be organised in Canvas when you're trying to revise.

Great as a person, as a teacher you have been warned. Have had previous classes with him that went ok, but this semester was a bit of a disaster. 3/4 of the class failed the midterm, tested on "what we learned in class" but seminars were all over the place and no PPTs. If possible, I would take another class; course material re-used and unclear.
